name: Bluebook Citation Format
summary: Standard legal citation format for court filings and legal memoranda. Covers cases, statutes, and secondary sources.
content:
# Bluebook Citation Format

The Bluebook is the standard citation system for U.S. legal documents.

## Case Citations
- Full: *Smith v. Jones*, 123 F.3d 456, 458 (9th Cir. 2020)
- Short: *Smith*, 123 F.3d at 459
- Id.: *Id.* at 460

## Statute Citations
- Federal: 42 U.S.C. § 1983 (2018)
- State: Cal. Civ. Code § 1542 (West 2020)

## Rules
- Fed. R. Civ. P. 12(b)(6)
- Fed. R. Evid. 702

## Secondary Sources
- Restatements: Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 90 (Am. L. Inst. 1981)
- Treatises: 5 Wright & Miller, Federal Practice and Procedure § 1216 (3d ed. 2004)

## Common Signals
- *See* (direct support)
- *See also* (additional support)
- *Cf.* (analogous support)
- *But see* (contrary authority)
